title: Rich Japanese Cheese Donburi
description: A comforting Kansai-inspired donburi that layers creamy cheese, paprika, and a sweet glaze to create a melt-in-your-mouth, nostalgia‑filled dish.
instructions: Cook the rice according to package instructions and let it rest for 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, mirin, sugar, water, and butter until the sugar fully dissolves.
Pour the glaze mixture into a nonstick skillet over medium heat and stir until it thickens into a glossy sauce.
Spread the pre‑cooked rice evenly across the skillet.
Sprinkle shredded mozzarella and cheddar cheeses evenly over the rice.
Lightly dust the cheese with paprika for a touch of color and flavor.
Cover the skillet with a lid and reduce the heat to low; cook for 3 to 4 minutes until the cheese melts into a stretchy pull.
Remove from heat, let the donburi sit for 2 minutes, then serve immediately with a drizzle of any remaining glaze.
